PowerShell($env:DATABASE_URL = "postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5434/judging_dev"; $env:NODE_ENV = "development"; $env:PORT = "3000"; $env:LOG_LEVEL = "info"; $env:CORS_ORIGIN = "http://localhost:3000"; Set-Location "C:\\Users\\Bruno\\Desktop\\www\\jurados\\sistema-julgamento\\packages\\api"; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "npx" -ArgumentList "ts-node","-r","tsconfig-paths/register","src/main.ts" -PassThru -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/health" -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object StatusCode, Content } catch { $_.Exception.Message }; $proc.Kill\(\))

PowerShell($env:DATABASE_URL = "postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5434/judging_dev"; $env:NODE_ENV = "development"; $env:PORT = "3000"; $env:LOG_LEVEL = "info"; $env:CORS_ORIGIN = "http://localhost:3000"; Set-Location "C:\\Users\\Bruno\\Desktop\\www\\jurados\\sistema-julgamento\\packages\\api"; $job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { Set-Location "C:\\Users\\Bruno\\Desktop\\www\\jurados\\sistema-julgamento\\packages\\api"; $env:DATABASE_URL = "postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5434/judging_dev"; $env:NODE_ENV = "development"; $env:PORT = "3000"; $env:LOG_LEVEL = "info"; $env:CORS_ORIGIN = "http://localhost:3000"; npx ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register src/main.ts 2>&1 }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/health" -UseBasicParsing; "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\) BODY: $\($r.Content\)" } catch { "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; Stop-Job $job; Remove-Job $job)
